title: Grim Reaper Combat
description: This plugin adds 4 Custom Grim Reaper Themed Weapons to use in combat
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1n-klcWSeRE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## About
Grim Reaper Combat adds 4 Grim Reaper/Death Themed Weapons into the game. These weapons will not spawn naturally and are only obtained via commands

The video using this plugin is above

## Content
**_Scythe_** - Acts like a mace, and a axe disabling shields upon hit. 10 hits charges a blood dash that launches player in the air

**_Devils Eye_** - Left clicking creates a blood circle trapping players inside. Players caught cannot use utilities and are given blindness and slowness. User receives regeneration inside circle

**_Reapers Bow_** - A Crossbow that when fully charged freezes players shot by it

**_Reapers Shield_** - A Shield that upon user blocking hits steals health from attacker

## Commands

```
/grimreaper give scythe
```
```
/grimreaper give devils_eye
```
```
/grimreaper give reapers_bow
```
```
/grimreaper give reapers_shield
```
